commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ebd12b02e6c66fe5267b8736f4ff0d75f61fccdb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `ready_to_merge` Workboard status, changes `workboard_complete` to check for review-looking proof, and adds `workboard_submit_review` to record structured review verdicts.

PR surface: Source +166. Total +166 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings by source inspection: a claimed `running` card with no existing proof still passes the new gate, and the new tool is absent from the plugin registration/manifest lists. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor proof plus maintainer review of the new Workboard status before any automated repair or merge path should proceed.

target.title: feat(workboard): review gate hard blocks + workboard_submit_review tool
target.body:
## What this changes

Enforces the orchestration pipeline's Stage 4 REVIEW GATE at the **tool level** — agents physically cannot skip review.

### 1. `workboard_complete` hard blocks (168 lines)

Rejects completion if:
- Card status is not `review`, `ready_to_merge`, or `running`
- Card has proof records but none with `status="passed"` and a label matching `/review/i`

The tool throws before any store mutation. No workaround.

### 2. New tool: `workboard_submit_review`

Structured review verdict submission:
- Validates verdict: `approved`, `changes_requested`, `blocked`
- Validates 6 check dimensions: correctness, quality, performance, completeness, integration, tests
- Records proof with `review-round-N` label
- Auto-moves card status:
  - `approved` → `ready_to_merge`
  - `changes_requested` → `running` (back to worker)
  - `blocked` → `blocked`
- **Escalation:** After 3 failed rounds without approval, auto-blocks for human intervention

### 3. New status: `ready_to_merge`

Added to `WORKBOARD_STATUSES`. Represents a card that passed review and is awaiting serial merge.

### Files
- `extensions/workboard/src/tools.ts` — 162 insertions
- `extensions/workboard/src/types.ts` — 1 insertion

### Why this matters

Without this, an agent can call `workboard_complete` at any time, skipping review entirely. This happened in practice — cards were marked `done` without any reviewer session. Now the tool enforces the pipeline regardless of agent behavior.

### Testing
- TypeScript compilation passes (no new errors beyond pre-existing ES2023 target issues in store.ts)
- Manual verification of tool logic against the type contracts
target.author: rizwan-saddal

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
